notes: Fixed: Smart Reps AI now responds correctly — switched to stable model identifier and added proper API error inspection
Fixed: Superset amber lines now reliably show and hide when adding/removing exercises from groups — rewrote group position detection logic
Fixed: Supersets now visually display during a live workout — amber left border, grouped card styling, and reduced spacing between paired exercises
Fixed: Smart Reps AI now connects successfully — missing required Anthropic API headers were added
Fixed: Home screen saved plans replaced with a clean summary line and 'View All' link instead of an expanding folder grid
Fixed: White horizontal line near Quick Start buttons and workout-in-progress banner resolved
Fixed: Gap/indent between first two exercises in Build view caused by mismatched superset wrapper divs
Fixed: Numbers and text now align correctly on iPhone — emoji fonts moved to end of font stack so system fonts handle text metrics
Fixed: Edit button on profile chips no longer covers the profile name — moved to top-left corner
Fixed: Training goal now saves correctly per-profile (was saving as 'undefined' due to template interpolation timing)
New: Search bar in the muscle group exercise picker — filter by name without leaving the sheet
Improved: Muscle group emoji icons are larger (26px) and properly spaced in Build and Home views
Fixed: Workout history detail sheet is now bounded to 82% screen height with internal scrolling and a close button
Training goal is now per-profile — each profile can have Strength, Growth, Toning, Power, or Weight Loss set independently
Smart Reps recommendations and history shown during a workout now reflect the active logging profile, not the session owner
Edit profile — small Edit button on each profile chip to change name, emoji, and color
Typography and spacing overhaul — stat numbers, row heights, input padding, label margins, and line-heights improved throughout
Tools & Progress in Profile is now a 2-column icon grid instead of a plain list
Saved Plans page with expandable folder sections (Profile → Saved Plans tile)
Save Plan now supports multiple folders — tap existing folder chips or type a new one
Save Plan emoji picker now shows large tappable emoji buttons that render correctly on iPhone
Filter section headers (Muscle, Equipment, etc.) are now centered
History tab has Calendar and Charts buttons at the bottom for easy iPhone thumb access
Fixed: Exercise tab filters now update instantly including chip highlights and Target Area sub-muscle row
Fixed: Selecting a muscle group now shows Target Area chips (Long Head, Short Head, etc.) immediately
Fixed: Superset 'Add next to SS' no longer absorbs an unrelated exercise group above it
Fixed: Emoji now render as color glyphs on iPhone — font stack applied globally to body
Fixed: Folder input now appears in Save Plan sheet (was wired but missing from UI)
Improved: Inline Smart Recs on every live workout exercise — suggested weight and reps with Too Easy / Just Right / Too Heavy feedback buttons that adjust future recommendations
Improved: Smart Reps AI page now explains no Claude account is needed and there are no free-tier limits
Smart Reps AI — Claude-powered chat coach with personalized weight and rep recommendations based on your history
Edit workout in session — add, remove, and reorder exercises while a workout is running
Workout folders — organize saved plans into named categories (Push/Pull, Strength, etc.)
Swap exercise — searchable sheet to replace an exercise while keeping your sets
Touch drag-to-reorder exercises in Build view — hold the grip icon and drag
Persistent workout timer banner — shows on all tabs while a workout is active
Rest timer notification — system notification fires when rest period ends
Sub-muscle filtering in Exercises tab (e.g. Long Head / Short Head for Biceps)
Delete profile — small X button on profile chips in Profile settings
Edit and import custom exercises — edit any custom exercise, or bulk-import from JSON
Overwrite saved plans — prompted when saving a plan with a duplicate name
GitHub sync now includes saved plans, templates, and custom exercises
Fixed: emoji rendering on iPhone (exercise icons, badge icons, plan cards)
Fixed: search input in Exercises tab no longer dismisses keyboard on each keystroke
Fixed: Swap Exercise button now works
Exercise names now wrap to multiple lines — no more truncation on long names
Tab bar moved closer to the bottom of the screen on iPhone
Prebuilt plans (Push Day, PPL, etc.) now load into the Build tab for editing before starting — set participants, swap exercises, adjust sets
Save any workout as a custom plan — floppy disk icon in Build header, saved plans appear on Home screen
Supersets now support more than 2 exercises — tap '+ Add to SS' to chain a third, fourth, etc.
In-app update installer — tap 'Install Update Now' in Version History to update without leaving the app
Fixed: Participant checkboxes in Build now toggle correctly — tapping a row reliably adds or removes that profile
Fixed: Participants list is now properly persisted to storage on first load so toggling works from a correct baseline
Fixed: Header and nav bar now respond to Light/Dark/Auto theme
Fixed: Active profile banner always shows during a workout
Fixed: Participant selection in Build now uses custom tap-to-toggle rows instead of native checkboxes — fully visible and reliable on iOS
Fixed: Header and nav bar now respond to Light/Dark/Auto theme — were previously hardcoded dark regardless of setting
Improved: Participant rows show 'Included' label and colored highlight when selected, and update instantly on tap
Fixed: Version history sheet no longer takes up the full screen on iPhone — capped at 60% height with internal scrolling
Fixed: Version history sheet now has a visible close button (✕) in addition to tapping the background
Improved: Multi-profile workout switcher is now clearly tappable — shows each participant's name, emoji, and live set progress (e.g. 3/9 sets)
Improved: Hint text 'Tap to switch who you're logging for' added above profile chips during a workout
Fixed: Home tab no longer shows blank — caused by a variable name collision in the muscle picker template
Improved: GitHub setup now lets you link an existing Gist ID instead of always creating a new one
Improved: Gist ID field is editable when already connected, so you can relink to a different Gist
Fixed: Starting a workout showed only the timer — exercises, sets, and weight inputs now render correctly
Fixed: Build tab now updates instantly when adding exercises from the muscle picker — no longer requires switching tabs
Fixed: Duplicate 'In workout' badge no longer appears when removing and re-adding an exercise in the picker
Fixed: Set notes and weight/rep values now save correctly per profile during multi-profile workouts
Removed 'Recommended Next Features' section from Profile tab
Fixed difficulty filter chips (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced) showing as horizontal lines on iOS — replaced emoji circle characters with plain text labels
Fixed exercise picker chip highlight logic after emoji removal
Training Calendar — 6-month heatmap of workout frequency
Volume Charts — per-exercise progress graphs (max weight, total volume, sets done)
Plate Calculator — visual barbell plate math with color-coded plates
lbs ↔ kg converter built into Tools
Workout Templates — save any live workout as a reusable template
Per-set notes — add a note to any set during a workout
Milestones & Badges — 18 achievements to unlock
Multi-profile workouts — lift together, each gets their own history
Light / Dark / Auto theme toggle in Profile → Settings
Version history viewer with update prompts from GitHub
GitHub Gist setup wizard — step-by-step for new users
Superset visual overhaul — amber left-border group wrapper
Exercise picker now has full labelled filters matching the Exercise Browser
Build view refreshes instantly without navigating away
Favorites star is larger and amber-colored on all exercise cards
Start button shows exercise count (e.g. Start (6))
Swipe left to delete exercises from build view
Superset connector shown as amber bridge between paired exercises
Favorites — star any exercise from Build, Browser, or detail sheet
Exercise Browser filters organized into labeled sections
Added Favorites Only and Never Tried filter shortcuts
Rest timer redesigned with circular countdown ring
Skip Rest button added
Rest timer auto-starts after each completed set
Rest timer settings — configurable in Profile
Initial release — 274 exercises across 11 muscle groups
Interactive SVG body map for muscle selection
Smart exercise suggestions sorted by least-recently-used
Live workout tracker with sets, weight, reps, and rest timer
GitHub Gist sync for portable data across devices
Multiple lifting profiles with per-profile history
Personal bests and full workout history
Superset support and drag-to-reorder
Push/Pull/Legs, Upper/Lower, Full Body, Arnold Split preset plans
Custom exercise creator
